listitem.para: a string. The name of the option to get. The available options are presented below.
the value associated with the key.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para:
Returns the option of the given key. The following keys are available.
"-dimmax" : a floating point integer, the largest dimension available for the sequence. "-nbsimmax" : a floating point integer, the largest number of elements available for the sequence. "-faureprime" : a floating point integer, the prime integer used in the Faure sequence. "-faurefprime" : a floating point integer, the prime integer used in the Faure fast sequence.

refsection.title: Examples
